overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy riding a black horse through a stormy prairie landscape. The rider travels along a winding dirt path through rolling green hills and rocky outcrops, with large mesa formations emerging from the misty distance before encountering a horse-drawn wagon.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with rocky outcrop

agents.ego_description: trotting along a dirt trail through rolling grassy hills with a rocky hillside on the left

entered.detail: steep rocky terrain with sparse vegetation covering the left side of the trail
large twisted tree with bare branches standing beside the trail
winding dirt path cutting through the grassy landscape
tall green grass and scattered bushes lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a rider on horseback along a dirt trail through rolling prairie hills. A rocky hillside dominates the left side of the frame while a distinctive gnarled tree stands on the right. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting across the lush green landscape as the horse trots steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with distant rock formations

events.description: large rock buttes and mesa formations emerge from the atmospheric haze in the valley ahead

agents.ego_description: cantering through open grassland toward distant mountain formations with increasing visibility of large rock structures

entered.detail: hazy mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon through the mist
massive flat-topped rock formations rising from the prairie floor

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens into a vast prairie with distant mountains visible through the hazy atmosphere. As the rider progresses, massive rock buttes emerge from the mist ahead, dominating the horizon. The vegetation becomes sparser and rain begins to fall more visibly as the camera approaches the valley.

events.description: encountering and passing a horse-drawn wagon traveling in the same direction on the trail

agents.ego_description: overtaking a horse-drawn wagon and continuing through the open prairie as the rock formations recede behind

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon moving along the trail ahead, being overtaken by the player

segments.scene_description: The rider approaches and passes a horse-drawn wagon on the trail, the only other traffic in the vast landscape. After overtaking the wagon, the large rock formations recede into the background as the path continues through open grassland. The stormy atmosphere persists with rain falling steadily across the prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush, rolling prairie that gradually opens into a vast, rain-swept valley dominated by distant rock formations. It begins by following a rider on horseback along a dirt trail, passing a rocky hillside and a gnarled tree under a diffused, overcast sky. As the rider progresses, the terrain expands into a wide prairie where massive rock buttes emerge from the hazy atmosphere and rain begins to fall more visibly. The scene then shifts as the rider approaches and overtakes a lone horse-drawn wagon on the trail, the only other presence in the desolate landscape. Finally, the large rock formations recede into the background as the path continues through open grassland under a steady, stormy downpour.
